ab: pashtay piakalingkin piakaimahan, palhintal ita thuini musui kataunan makikalhi apu numanuma.
ch: A:大家健康平安，今天我們要一起去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Good health and peace to all, today we will go to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: ua! amashthau a lalawa iamin mat apu.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說邵語。

ab: ashaunatantuiza ita?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: ashauna’iutuiza.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: apu Kilash, itiza iamin munai mriqaz ihun.
en: A: Grandpa Kilash, we’ve come to see you.

ab: ba, mafazaq maniun mashthau! mathuaw maqitan!
ch: B:你們會說邵語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You guys speak Thau! That’s great!

ab: pashtay piakalingkin piakaimahan, palhintal ita thuini musui tamakuan mubuhat.
ch: A:大家健康平安，今天我們要一起去去菜園工作。
en: A: Be healthy and safe everyone, today we are going to work in the vegetable garden together.

ab: ua, shinshii.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: pashtay uniawan ududur, ata tu in’aura kmathu sa ubuhat a aniamin.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: ua, shinshii, kminathu iamin az’az a ubuhat a aniamin.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: a’itiza ita?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: niwan, ihazishuan.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: ushawan uhu shmansazum.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: ua, shmansazum iaku.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: ushaiza ihu mara sa rumfaz a madanshir.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: ua, amashashaw iaku rumfaz.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: pashtay piakalingkin piakaimahan, amutusi ita thuini ia’ianan numanuma wa lhkaribush a luluuman.
ch: A:大家健康平安，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Be healthy and safe, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: mathuaw maqitan! amiakuza ita ya mutantu?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: milhungqu ita ba-su mutantu.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: pashtay ududur, afariw ita sa qahil.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們要買票了。
en: A: Everyone line up, we need to buy tickets now.

ab: ua.
en: B: Yes.

ab: rumfaz itanamuqtha numa qlhuran itanarikus, shanamaniun mriqaz.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: shinshii, shungkash iaku qlhuran.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: ata tu shkash, ushaiza ihu riqazuan sa rumfaz.
en: A: Don’t be afraid, then you go and see the birds.

ab: ya tata wa tilhaz amushuqish ita muriut miasuun.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: ua, anuniza shinshii.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: numa sa minriqaz ihu qa thuini?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: minriqaz iaku sa manasha wa qlhuran numa itiawan sa manasha wa rumfaz.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: iahiaw, amushaiza ita.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: italhawan iakin, mathuaw mingkashlay naak a kuskus.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: palhintaz ita utusiwan wazaqan mrauz?
ch: A:我們一起去潭那邊游泳好嗎?
en: A: Shall we go swimming at the pool together?

ab: ua! paza!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: mathuaw inai manasha wa thau mrauz.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: mathuaw maruqruq imangkathi kinai ita mrauz shduuiza.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
